evals.prompt: Fix a Sirv file search request that 400s when searching the /products/new arrivals folder for JPGs tagged featured.
evals.expected_output: A request-shape fix that verifies official Sirv search fields, escapes paths/special characters, uses size <= 100, preserves upstream error details, and adds a focused regression test for the exact query.
expectations: Does not guess Lucene syntax from memory
Uses Sirv-specific folder fields such as dirname.paths or dirname.raw
Escapes slash and space in path values
Keeps the documented page size limit in mind
Preserves response body/status in debugging output

evals.prompt: Write a bulk import script for remote product images into Sirv and attach title, tags, and product metadata.
evals.expected_output: A token-refreshing workflow using /v2/files/fetch or upload, account limit checks, metadata endpoints, rate/pagination awareness, and verification through stat/meta/search calls.
expectations: Refreshes Bearer tokens instead of hard-coding long-lived values
Uses fetch for stable remote originals when appropriate
Sets title, description/tags, and product metadata after import
Checks account limits before bulk work
Verifies imported files with stat, meta, or search
